MM Woodford Well Fund (overriding royalty interests)

Through Hobbs Eagle Capital 2, filer and spouse hold a fractional interest in overriding royalties collected by MM Woodford.  The overriding royalty interests derive from:  -185 wells in Gavin County, OK; - 544 wells in Grady County, OK; - 3 wells in Major County, OK; - 348 wells in Stephens County, OK; - 24 wells in Blaine County, OK; - 1 well in Carter County, OK; - 2 wells in Love County, OK; and - 8 wells in McClain County, OK).  The following companies are paying the royalties to MM Woodward:  - Niswonger, - Angela South, - Charlie Brown, - Scout 07-05-13, - Sympson, - Garnett, - Mack, - Black Mesa 0505, - Umbach, and - May.

Oil lease, Permian Basin, NM - Endeavor Energy Resources, LP
Oil lease, Permian Basin, NM (Deep Well) - Mewbourne Oil Company
Mewbourne Oil Company, royalty payments (cash receivable) (value not readily ascertainable)

Subsequent to filing this report, filer divested his interests in an oil lease for a deep well in the Permian Basin reported on Part 6, Line 3.15.  When this interest was divested, filer learned that Mewbourne Oil Company owed the filer outstanding royalty payments.  Currently the amount of outstanding royalty payments is not ascertainable as Mewbourne Oil Company needs to complete a valuation prior to issuing payment.
